message:
Presenton Desktop electron-v0.7.3-beta

Smarter content generation, reliable web search, no more shady Windows popups, and a round of minor fixes under the hood. Clean update. 🙌

What's New

🧠 Smarter Slide Content Generation
• Overflow mitigation loop added — slides no longer clip or overflow when content runs long
• Improved system prompt for slide content generation — cleaner, better-fitting output every time

🔍 Web Search Fixed
• Web search is back to working reliably during presentation generation

🪟 Windows Fix
• Export tasks no longer flash a console window on Windows — cleaner, more polished experience

🔧 Minor Fixes
• Various small fixes and stability improvements across the app
